generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor for the permanent magnet synchronous motor in MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MABIMAX100SensorDataStream
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for the permanent magnet synchronous motor in MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MABIMAX100SensorDataStream
]

instance GearTransmissionPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor for the gear transmission in MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MABIMAX100SensorDataStream
]

instance CycloidalGearPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor for the cycloidal gear in MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MABIMAX100SensorDataStream
]

instance MABIMAX100SensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotorPositionSensor, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotorCurrentSensor, GearTransmissionPositionSensor, CycloidalGearPositionSensor
]

instance MABIMAX100AggregatedSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated and abstracted time series sensor data from MABI MAX 100 physical components"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MABIMAX100SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling, MathWorksSimulink, MontiArcAutomaton, CPPJavaProgramming
]

instance SysMLModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML-based modeling for structural and functional architecture of MABI MAX 100 Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ACMEArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component and connector perspectives in MABI MAX 100 Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance AADLArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for component and connector perspectives in MABI MAX 100 Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance MontiArcADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Architecture Description Language for component and connector perspectives in MABI MAX 100 Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance MontiArcAutomaton : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavior modeling and state machine specification of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionControlService
]

instance MathWorksSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink used for dynamic simulation and control algorithm development for MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionControlService
]

instance CPPJavaProgramming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ and Java programming for detailed behavior specification of MABI MAX 100 Digital Twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionControlService
]

instance RFLPMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for system complexity management and stakeholder integration in MABI MAX 100 Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance OOSEMMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for system complexity management and stakeholder integration in MABI MAX 100 Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SPESMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for system complexity management and stakeholder integration in MABI MAX 100 Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SMArDTMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for system complexity management and stakeholder integration in MABI MAX 100 Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous monitoring of MABI MAX 100 robot's performance and status"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance MotionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for precise motion control of MABI MAX 100 robot axes"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of robot motion and component status for high-precision manufacturing"
]

instance MotionControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time adjustment of robot axes for accurate motion control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs a Digital Shadow Reference Model defined as a UML class diagram (Fig. 1) and a Concrete Digital Shadow Model (Fig. 5), integrating components such as motor, gearbox, and sensors. It utilizes architecture patterns including SysML and UML for structural modeling, and implements Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized digital representation and interoperability."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The lifecycle phases of the Digital Twin encompass development stages defined by Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE), where modeling is structured across abstraction levels including requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layers. The methodology for deriving Digital Shadows (as part of the Twin development process) includes four specific steps: 1) Problem identification, 2) Asset and model analysis, 3) Use or creation of calculations/models, and 4) Data identification. These steps are supported by methodologies such as RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics), OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT, which manage complexity through structured abstraction and integration of heterogeneous stakeholder perspectives during the development phase."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for communication between physical and digital components."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems is achieved through MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming, Asset Administration Shells (AAS) ensuring interoperability across platforms, and connectivity to the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for industrial control system communication."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards includes the use of Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for structured asset information modeling, SysML for system architecture description, and MQTT protocol for lightweight publish-subscribe messaging in data streaming, ensuring interoperability and adherence to industrial communication protocols."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The safety cell of the robot restricts the maximum working range to [-90°, 90°]."
]
